name: Ren
description: A sharp-witted detective who solves mysteries through careful observation and logical deduction. Known for his calm demeanor under pressure.
background: Ren grew up in the port district of Springtown, where he learned to read people from the sailors and merchants passing through. After solving a series of missing artifact cases at the Great Library, he earned a reputation as the towns sharpest mind. He carries a worn leather notebook filled with observations and sketches. Though he appears serious, he has a dry sense of humor that emerges when he feels comfortable. He believes every mystery has a logical solution, but respects the unexplainable.

personality.speech_style: precise, analytical, occasional dry humor, uses deductive reasoning
